mapper.select: SELECT E.EMP_ID, E.DEPT_CD, E.EMP_NM, E.EMP_JBGD, D.DEPT_NM, E.EMP_PROFILE, E.EMP_ROLE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT C WHERE C.CHAT_RM_NO = #{chatRmNo} AND C.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID) as isJoined FROM EMPLOYEE E LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD) ORDER BY D.DEPT_NM ASC, CASE WHEN E.EMP_JBGD = '부장' THEN 1 WHEN E.EMP_JBGD = '팀장' THEN 2 WHEN E.EMP_JBGD = '과장' THEN 3 WHEN E.EMP_JBGD = '대리' THEN 4 WHEN E.EMP_JBGD = '주임' THEN 5 WHEN E.EMP_JBGD = '사원' THEN 6 ELSE 7 END ASC, E.EMP_NM ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_ROOM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM ( CHAT_RM_NO, CHAT_RM_TTL, CHAT_RM_TYPE, CHAT_RM_BGNG_DT, CHAT_RM_YN ) VALUES ( #{chatRmNo}, #{chatRmTtl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chatRmType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, 'Y' )

INSERT INTO CHAT ( CHAT_RM_NO, EMP_ID, CHAT_USER_NM, CHAT_USER_AUTH, CHAT_USER_BGNG_DT ) VALUES ( #{chatRmNo}, #{empId}, (SELECT EMP_NM FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId}), #{chatUserAuth}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT A.CHAT_RM_NO,
CASE WHEN A.CHAT_RM_TYPE = '1' THEN TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM TRIM(REPLACE(A.CHAT_RM_TTL, (SELECT EMP_NM FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId}), ''))) ELSE A.CHAT_RM_TTL END AS CHAT_RM_TTL,
A.CHAT_RM_TYPE, (SELECT CASE WHEN CHAT_TYPE = 'FILE' THEN TO_CLOB('첨부파일을 보냈습니다.') WHEN CHAT_TYPE = 'IMAGE' THEN TO_CLOB('사진을 보냈습니다.') ELSE CHAT_CN END FROM ( SELECT CHAT_CN, CHAT_TYPE FROM CHAT_LOG WHERE CHAT_RM_NO = A.CHAT_RM_NO AND CHAT_DT >= B.CHAT_USER_BGNG_DT ORDER BY CHAT_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS CHAT_RM_LAST_MSG, A.CHAT_RM_BGNG_DT, A.CHAT_RM_YN, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT C WHERE C.CHAT_RM_NO = A.CHAT_RM_NO) AS userCount FROM CHAT_ROOM A INNER JOIN CHAT B ON A.CHAT_RM_NO = B.CHAT_RM_NO WHERE B.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND A.CHAT_RM_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ( SELECT MAX(CHAT_DT) FROM CHAT_LOG WHERE CHAT_RM_NO = A.CHAT_RM_NO AND CHAT_DT >= B.CHAT_USER_BGNG_DT ) DESC NULLS LAST, A.CHAT_RM_BGNG_DT DESC

SELECT A.CHAT_RM_NO AS chatRmNo, A.EMP_ID AS empId, A.CHAT_USER_NM AS chatUserNm, A.CHAT_USER_AUTH AS chatUserAuth, B.EMP_NM AS empNm, B.EMP_PROFILE AS empProfile, B.EMP_JBGD AS empJbgd, C.DEPT_NM AS deptNm FROM CHAT A INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON A.EMP_ID = B.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT C ON B.DEPT_CD = C.DEPT_CD WHERE A.CHAT_RM_NO = #{chatRmNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_LOG.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CHAT_LOG ( CHAT_LOG_NO, CHAT_RM_NO, EMP_ID, CHAT_CN, CHAT_DT, FILE_ID, CHAT_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{chatLogNo}, #{chatRmNo}, #{empId}, #{chatCn, jdbcType=CLOB}, SYSDATE,
#{fileId} NULL , #{chatType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.CHAT_LOG_NO, A.CHAT_RM_NO, A.EMP_ID, A.CHAT_CN, A.CHAT_DT, A.FILE_ID, A.CHAT_TYPE, B.EMP_NM, B.EMP_PROFILE, F.FILE_DTL_ID, F.FILE_DTL_O_NM AS fileName FROM CHAT_LOG A INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON A.EMP_ID = B.EMP_ID INNER JOIN CHAT C ON A.CHAT_RM_NO = C.CHAT_RM_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN FILE_DETAIL F ON (A.FILE_ID = F.FILE_ID) WHERE A.CHAT_RM_NO = #{chatRmNo} AND C.EMP_ID = #{loginEmpId} AND A.CHAT_DT >= C.CHAT_USER_BGNG_DT ORDER BY A.CHAT_DT ASC

SELECT CHAT_RM_NO, CHAT_RM_TTL, CHAT_RM_TYPE, CHAT_RM_LAST_MSG, CHAT_RM_BGNG_DT, CHAT_RM_YN, (SELECT EMP_ID FROM CHAT WHERE CHAT_RM_NO = #{chatRmNo} AND CHAT_USER_AUTH = '방장') as empId FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE CHAT_RM_NO = #{chatRmNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE CHAT_ROOM SET CHAT_RM_TTL = #{chatRmTtl} WHERE CHAT_RM_NO = #{chatRmNo}
mapper.select: SELECT A.CHAT_RM_NO, A.CHAT_RM_TTL, A.CHAT_RM_TYPE FROM CHAT_ROOM A INNER JOIN CHAT B ON A.CHAT_RM_NO = B.CHAT_RM_NO WHERE A.CHAT_RM_TYPE = '1' AND A.CHAT_RM_YN = 'Y' AND B.CHAT_RM_NO IN ( SELECT CHAT_RM_NO FROM CHAT WHERE EMP_ID IN (#{myId}, #{targetId}) GROUP BY CHAT_RM_NO HAVING COUNT(EMP_ID) = 2 ) AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT WHERE CHAT_RM_NO = A.CHAT_RM_NO) = 2 GROUP BY A.CHAT_RM_NO, A.CHAT_RM_TTL, A.CHAT_RM_TYPE
SELECT FILE_DTL_O_NM FROM FILE_DETAIL WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT A.CHAT_RM_NO, A.CHAT_RM_TTL, A.CHAT_RM_TYPE FROM CHAT_ROOM A INNER JOIN CHAT B ON A.CHAT_RM_NO = B.CHAT_RM_NO WHERE A.CHAT_RM_TTL = #{title} AND B.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND A.CHAT_RM_YN = 'Y'
